title: picris manginiana
intro: Picris manginiana, also known as Mangin's picris or Picris manginiana, is a plant species in the dandelion family. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Picris manginiana include its ability to treat digestive issues and skin problems due to its astringent and antiseptic properties. The herbal preparations of Picris manginiana include infusions, tinctures, and salves, often used to treat external skin conditions and digestive issues.
